TestCase z10Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.a != NULL) {
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    }
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to sort, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Simple insertion sort ascending
    for (int i = 1; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        int key = follow_case.a[i];
        int j = i - 1;
        while (j >= 0 && follow_case.a[j] > key) {
            follow_case.a[j + 1] = follow_case.a[j];
            j--;
        }
        follow_case.a[j + 1] = key;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
